song.title: Jeuss Paid It All
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C V3 C B C
song.lyrics:
.Capo 4 [v1] .G I hear the Savior say .D G Thy strength indeed is small .D/F# Em C Child of weakness watch and pray .G D G Find in Me Thine all in all
[c] .G D/F# Em Jesus paid it all .G D All to Him I owe .G G/B C Sin had left a crimson stain .G D G He washed it white as snow
[v2] Lord now indeed I find Thy power and Thine alone Can change the leper's spots And melt the heart of stone
[v3] And when before the throne I stand in Him complete Jesus die my soul to save My lips shall still repeat [b] . G G/B C Oh, praise the One who paid my debt . G/B Am G/B C And raised this life up from the dead
